infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aangan needs camera access to take profile photos and event pictures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Aangan needs photo library access to share photos with your family.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Aangan uses your location for event check-in.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Aangan can help you invite family members from your contacts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aangan needs microphone access to record voice messages and use voice input.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Aangan uses speech recognition to convert your voice to text in Hindi and English.

plugins.photosPermission: Aangan needs access to your photos to share with family.
plugins.cameraPermission: Aangan needs camera to take photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Aangan uses location for event auto check-in.

plugins.cameraPermission: Aangan needs camera for QR scanning and photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Aangan needs microphone to record voice messages.
Aangan needs microphone for voice input.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Aangan uses speech recognition for voice-to-text in Hindi and English.
